creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text: I'm not trying to be dismissive either and get your frustration. I saw that you already asked the same question of why we're still using ccache 3.x as the default in Bug #252088 and didn't get an adequate response. The inception and commit history of the devel/ccache4 port seems to be largely based on maintainer timeouts, community work, and probably shouldn't even be a thing since 3.x is 3+ years old now.
